tEn: SimMIM: A Simple Framework for Masked Image Modeling
tZh: SimMIM：一种简单的掩码图像建模框架
sEn: SimMIM simplifies masked image modeling with random masking, raw pixel regression, and a linear prediction head, achieving strong results.
sZh: SimMIM通过随机掩码、原始像素回归和线性预测头简化了掩码图像建模，取得了优异的结果。
absEn: This paper presents SimMIM, a simple framework for masked image modeling. We simplify recently proposed related approaches without special designs such as block-wise masking and tokenization via discrete VAE or clustering. To study what let the masked image modeling task learn good representations, we systematically study the major components in our framework, and find that simple designs of each component have revealed very strong representation learning performance: 1) random masking of the input image with a moderately large masked patch size (e.g., 32) makes a strong pre-text task; 2) predicting raw pixels of RGB values by direct regression performs no worse than the patch classification approaches with complex designs; 3) the prediction head can be as light as a linear layer, with no worse performance than heavier ones. Using ViT-B, our approach achieves 83.8% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K by pre-training also on this dataset, surpassing previous best approach by +0.6%. When applied on a larger model of about 650 million parameters, SwinV2-H, it achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K using only ImageNet-1K data. We also leverage this approach to facilitate the training of a 3B model (SwinV2-G), that by $40\times$ less data than that in previous practice, we achieve the state-of-the-art on four representative vision benchmarks. The code and models will be publicly available at https://github.com/microsoft/SimMIM.
absZh: 本文提出了SimMIM，一个简单的掩码图像建模框架。我们简化了最近提出的相关方法，无需特殊设计如块状掩码或通过离散VAE或聚类的标记化。为了研究掩码图像建模任务如何学习好的表示，我们系统地研究了框架中的主要组成部分，发现每个组件的简单设计已经展现出非常强的表示学习性能：1）对输入图像进行随机掩码，使用中等大小的掩码块（例如32）构成了一个强大的预文本任务；2）通过直接回归预测RGB值的原始像素，其性能不亚于具有复杂设计的块分类方法；3）预测头可以轻量到仅为一个线性层，性能不亚于更重的预测头。使用ViT-B，我们的方法在ImageNet-1K上预训练后，微调top-1准确率达到83.8%，比之前的最佳方法高出0.6%。当应用于约6.5亿参数的更大模型SwinV2-H时，仅使用ImageNet-1K数据就达到了87.1%的top-1准确率。我们还利用该方法促进了30亿参数模型（SwinV2-G）的训练，与以往实践相比，数据量减少了40倍，在四个代表性视觉基准上达到了最先进水平。代码和模型将在https://github.com/microsoft/SimMIM公开。

contrib.en: Proposes SimMIM, a simple framework for masked image modeling without special designs like block-wise masking or discrete VAE tokenization.
contrib.zh: 提出SimMIM，一个简单的掩码图像建模框架，无需块状掩码或离散VAE分词等特殊设计。

contrib.en: Shows random masking with large patch size (e.g., 32) and raw pixel regression via ℓ1 loss yields strong representations.
contrib.zh: 表明使用大块尺寸（如32）的随机掩码和通过ℓ1损失的原始像素回归可产生强表征。

contrib.en: Demonstrates a linear prediction head suffices, achieving 83.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ViT-B.
contrib.zh: 证明线性预测头足够，在ImageNet-1K上使用ViT-B达到83.8% top-1准确率。

contrib.en: Scales to 3B-parameter SwinV2-G, achieving state-of-the-art on four vision benchmarks with 40× less data.
contrib.zh: 扩展到3B参数的SwinV2-G，在四个视觉基准上以40倍更少数据达到最先进水平。

contrib.en: Systematically studies masking strategy, prediction target, and head design, revealing simple designs are optimal.
contrib.zh: 系统研究掩码策略、预测目标和头部设计，揭示简单设计最优。

contrib.en: Provides code and models publicly at https://github.com/microsoft/SimMIM.

limits.en: Evaluation primarily on ImageNet-1K; generalization to other domains not extensively validated.
limits.zh: 主要评估在ImageNet-1K上；未广泛验证对其他领域的泛化性。

limits.en: Requires large masked patch size (e.g., 32) and high masking ratio (e.g., 60%) for best performance.
limits.zh: 需要大掩码块尺寸（如32）和高掩码率（如60%）以获得最佳性能。

limits.en: Pre-training on ImageNet-1K only; performance on other datasets may vary.
limits.zh: 仅在ImageNet-1K上预训练；在其他数据集上的性能可能不同。

limits.en: Heavier prediction heads or higher target resolutions do not improve fine-tuning performance.
limits.zh: 更重的预测头或更高目标分辨率不会提升微调性能。

limits.en: Limited analysis on why simple designs outperform complex ones; relies on empirical observations.
limits.zh: 对简单设计为何优于复杂设计的分析有限；依赖经验观察。

items.en: This paper presents SimMIM, a simple framework for masked image modeling. We have simplified recently proposed relevant approaches, without the need for special designs, such as block-wise masking and tokenization via discrete VAE or clustering. To investigate what makes a masked image modeling task learn good representations, we systematically study the major components in our framework, and find that the simple designs of each component have revealed very strong representation learning performance: 1) random masking of the input image with a moderately large masked patch size (e.g., 32) makes a powerful pre-text task; 2) predicting RGB values of raw pixels by direct regression performs no worse than the patch classification approaches with complex designs; 3) the prediction head can be as light as a linear layer, with no worse performance than heavier ones. Using ViT-B, our approach achieves 83.8% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K by pre-training also on this dataset, surpassing previous best approach by +0.6%. When applied to a larger model with about 650 million parameters, SwinV2-H, it achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K using only ImageNet-1K data. We also leverage this approach to address the data-hungry issue faced by large-scale model training, that a 3B model (SwinV2-G) is successfully trained to achieve state-of-the-art accuracy on four representative vision benchmarks using 40×40\times less labelled data than that in previous practice (JFT-3B). The code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/SimMIM.
items.zh: 本文提出了SimMIM，一个用于掩码图像建模的简单框架。我们简化了最近提出的相关方法，无需特殊设计，例如分块掩码和通过离散VAE或聚类进行分词。为了探究掩码图像建模任务如何学习良好表征，我们系统地研究了框架中的主要组成部分，发现每个部分的简单设计都展现出了非常强大的表征学习性能：1）对输入图像进行随机掩码，掩码块大小适中（例如32），构成了一个强大的预文本任务；2）通过直接回归预测原始像素的RGB值，其性能不逊于具有复杂设计的补丁分类方法；3）预测头可以轻量到仅为一个线性层，且性能不逊于更重的预测头。使用ViT-B，我们的方法在ImageNet-1K上预训练并微调，达到了83.8%的top-1准确率，比之前的最佳方法高出+0.6%。当应用于约6.5亿参数的更大模型SwinV2-H时，仅使用ImageNet-1K数据就达到了87.1%的top-1准确率。我们还利用该方法解决了大规模模型训练中的数据饥饿问题，成功训练了一个3B模型（SwinV2-G），在四个代表性视觉基准上使用比先前实践（JFT-3B）少40×的标注数据，达到了最先进的准确率。代码可在https://github.com/microsoft/SimMIM获取。

items.en: “What I cannot create, I do not understand.”
items.zh: “我无法创造的东西，我就无法理解。”

items.en: “Masked signal modeling” is one such task that learns to create: masking a portion of input signals and trying to predict these masked signals. In NLP, following this philosophy, self-supervised learning approaches built on the masked language modeling tasks have largely repainted the field [12, 32, 2], i.e., learning very large-scale language models by using huge amounts of unlabeled data has been shown to generalize well to a broad range of NLP applications.
items.zh: “掩码信号建模”就是这样一种学习创造的任务：掩码部分输入信号并尝试预测这些掩码信号。在NLP中，遵循这一理念，基于掩码语言建模任务的自监督学习方法极大地重塑了该领域[12, 32, 2]，即通过使用大量无标签数据学习超大规模语言模型，已被证明能很好地泛化到广泛的NLP应用。

items.capEn: Figure 1: An illustration of our simple framework for masked language modeling, named SimMIM. It predicts raw pixel values of the randomly masked patches by a lightweight one-layer head, and performs learning using a simple ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss.
items.capZh: 图1：我们用于掩码语言建模的简单框架SimMIM的示意图。它通过一个轻量级的单层头预测随机掩码块的原始像素值，并使用简单的ℓ1损失进行学习。

items.en: In computer vision, although there are pioneers leveraging this philosophy for self-supervised representation learning [60, 61, 13], in previous years, this line of work was almost buried by the contrastive learning approaches [51, 21, 8]. The different difficulties of applying this task to the language and visual domains can be explained by the differences between two modalities. One of the differences is that images exhibit stronger locality: pixels that are close to each other tend to be highly correlated [27], so the task can be done by duplicating close pixels rather than by semantic reasoning. Another difference is that visual signals are raw and low-level, while text tokens are human-generated high-level concepts. This raises a question of whether the prediction of low-level signals is useful for high-level visual recognition tasks. A third difference is that the visual signal is continuous, and the text token is discrete. It is unknown how classification-based masked language modeling approaches can be adapted to handle continuous visual signals well.
items.zh: 在计算机视觉中，尽管有先驱者利用这一理念进行自监督表征学习[60, 61, 13]，但在过去几年中，这一研究方向几乎被对比学习方法[51, 21, 8]所淹没。将这一任务应用于语言和视觉领域的不同困难可以通过两种模态之间的差异来解释。差异之一是图像表现出更强的局部性：彼此接近的像素往往高度相关[27]，因此任务可以通过复制邻近像素而非语义推理来完成。另一个差异是视觉信号是原始且低层次的，而文本标记是人类生成的高层概念。这引发了一个问题：预测低层信号是否对高层视觉识别任务有用。第三个差异是视觉信号是连续的，而文本标记是离散的。目前尚不清楚基于分类的掩码语言建模方法如何能很好地适应处理连续的视觉信号。

items.en: Until recently, there have been trials that attempt to bridge modality gaps and resolve the obstacles, by introducing several special designs, for example, by converting continuous signals into color clusters [7], by patch tokenization using an additional network [1], or by a block-wise masking strategy to break short-range connections [1], etc. Through these special designs, the learned representations proved to be well transferable to several visual recognition tasks.
items.zh: 直到最近，有一些尝试试图弥合模态差距并解决障碍，通过引入几种特殊设计，例如，将连续信号转换为颜色簇[7]，使用额外网络进行补丁分词[1]，或采用分块掩码策略以打破短程连接[1]等。通过这些特殊设计，学习到的表征被证明可以很好地迁移到多个视觉识别任务。

items.en: In contrast to requiring special complex designs, in this paper, we present a simple framework which aligns well with the nature of visual signals, as shown in Figure 1, and is able to learn similar or even better representations than previously more complex approaches: random masking of input image patches, using a linear layer to regress the raw pixel values of the masked area with an ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss. The key designs and insights behind this simple framework include:
items.zh: 与需要特殊复杂设计相反，在本文中，我们提出了一个与视觉信号本质很好对齐的简单框架，如图1所示，并且能够学习到与先前更复杂方法相似甚至更好的表征：随机掩码输入图像块，使用线性层通过ℓ1损失回归掩码区域的原始像素值。这一简单框架背后的关键设计和见解包括：

items.en: Random masking is applied on image patches, which is simple and convenient for vision Transformers. For masked pixels, either larger patch size or higher masking ratio can result in a smaller chance of finding visible pixels that are close. For a large masking patch size of 32, the approach can achieve competitive performance in a wide range of masking ratios (10%-70%). For a small mask patch size of 8, the masking ratio needs to be as high as 80% to perform well. Note that the preferred masking ratios are very different from that in the language domain, where a small masking ratio of 0.15 is adopted as default. We hypothesize that different degrees of information redundancy in two modalities may lead to the different behaviors.
items.zh: 随机掩码应用于图像块，这对于视觉Transformer简单且方便。对于掩码像素，较大的掩码块大小或较高的掩码比例都会导致找到邻近可见像素的机会更小。对于大的掩码块大小32，该方法在广泛的掩码比例（10%-70%）下都能取得有竞争力的性能。对于小的掩码块大小8，掩码比例需要高达80%才能表现良好。注意，偏好的掩码比例与语言领域非常不同，语言领域默认采用0.15的小掩码比例。我们假设两种模态中信息冗余程度的不同可能导致不同的行为。

items.en: A raw pixel regression task is used. The regression task aligns well with the continuous nature of visual signals, which possesses ordering property. This simple task performs no worse than the classification approaches with classes specially defined by tokenization, clustering, or discretization.
items.zh: 使用原始像素回归任务。回归任务与视觉信号的连续性质很好对齐，视觉信号具有排序属性。这个简单任务的性能不逊于通过分词、聚类或离散化特殊定义类别的分类方法。

items.en: An extremely lightweight prediction head (e.g., a linear layer) is adopted, which achieves similarly or slightly better transferring performance than that of heavier prediction heads (e.g., an inverse Swin-B). The use of an extremely lightweight prediction head brings a remarkable speedup in pre-training. In addition, we note that a broad range of target resolutions (e.g., 122superscript12212^{2}-962superscript96296^{2}) perform competitive with the highest 1922superscript1922192^{2}. While heavier heads or higher resolutions generally result in greater generation capability, this greater capability does not necessarily benefit down-stream fine-tuning tasks.
items.zh: 采用极其轻量级的预测头（例如线性层），其迁移性能与更重的预测头（例如逆Swin-B）相似或略好。使用极其轻量级的预测头在预训练中带来了显著的加速。此外，我们注意到广泛的目标分辨率（例如12²-96²）与最高的192²性能相当。而更重的头或更高的分辨率通常带来更强的生成能力，但这种更强的能力不一定有利于下游微调任务。

items.en: Though simple, the proposed SimMIM approach is very effective for representation learning. Using ViT-B, it achieves 83.8% top-1 fine-tuning accuracy on ImageNet-1K, surpassing previous best approach ([1]) by +0.6%. SimMIM has also shown to be scalable to larger models: with a SwinV2-H model (658M parameters) [33], it achieves 87.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K classification, which is the highest number among methods that use ImageNet-1K data only. This result encourages the use of self-supervised learning to address the increasing data-hungry problem caused by quickly rising model capacity. In fact, with the help of SimMIM, we successfully trained a SwinV2-G model with 3 billion parameters [33] using ∼similar-to\sim40×\times smaller data than that of Google’s JFT-3B dataset, and set new records on several representative benchmarks: 84.0% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-V2 classification [42], 63.1/54.4 box/mask mAP on COCO object detection [6, 31], 59.9 mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation [63, 52], and 86.8% top-1 accuracy on Kinetics-400 action recognition [28, 35].
items.zh: 尽管简单，所提出的SimMIM方法在表征学习上非常有效。使用ViT-B，它在ImageNet-1K上通过预训练和微调达到了83.8%的top-1准确率，比之前的最佳方法[1]高出+0.6%。SimMIM还显示出可扩展到更大模型：使用SwinV2-H模型（658M参数）[33]，仅使用ImageNet-1K数据就达到了87.1%的top-1准确率，这是仅使用ImageNet-1K数据的方法中的最高数字。这一结果鼓励使用自监督学习来解决因模型容量快速上升而日益严重的数据饥饿问题。事实上，借助SimMIM，我们成功训练了一个拥有30亿参数的SwinV2-G模型[33]，使用的数据比Google的JFT-3B数据集少约40倍，并在几个代表性基准上创造了新纪录：ImageNet-V2分类上84.0%的top-1准确率[42]，COCO目标检测上63.1/54.4的box/mask mAP[6, 31]，ADE20K语义分割上59.9的mIoU[63, 52]，以及Kinetics-400动作识别上86.8%的top-1准确率[28, 35]。

items.en: While in recent years we have witnessed an increasing overlap between NLP and computer vision in both basic modeling and learning algorithms, as well as in multi-modal applications, which aligns well with how human brains achieve general intelligence capabilities, we hope that our demonstration of “masked signal modeling” in computer vision can drive this trend a bit further and encourage deeper interaction of different AI fields.
items.zh: 尽管近年来我们见证了NLP和计算机视觉在基本建模和学习算法以及多模态应用方面的日益重叠，这与人类大脑实现通用智能能力的方式一致，我们希望我们在计算机视觉中展示的“掩码信号建模”能够进一步推动这一趋势，并鼓励不同AI领域的深入互动。

items.en: Masked language modeling [12, 32] and its auto-regressive variants [2] are the dominant self-supervised learning approaches in the field of natural language processing (NLP). Given visible tokens in a sentence or a sentence pair / triplet, the approaches learn representations by predicting invisible tokens of the input. This line of approaches has repainted the field since about 3 years ago [12], that it enables the learning of very large language models and generalizes well on broad language understanding and generation tasks by leveraging huge data.
items.zh: 掩码语言建模[12, 32]及其自回归变体[2]是自然语言处理（NLP）领域占主导地位的自监督学习方法。给定句子或句子对/三元组中的可见标记，这些方法通过预测输入的不可见标记来学习表征。这一系列方法大约在三年前重塑了该领域[12]，它使得学习非常大的语言模型成为可能，并通过利用海量数据在广泛的语言理解和生成任务上表现良好。

items.en: Masked image modeling [13, 38, 23, 47, 7] progressed in parallel with the MLM task in NLP but located in a non-mainstream position for a long time. The context encoder approach [38] is a pioneer work in this direction, which masks a rectangle area of the original images, and predicts the missing pixels. CPC [23, 47] predicts patches via a verification task in each batch with a contrastive predictive coding loss. Recently, iGPT [7], ViT [15] and BEiT [1] recall this learning approach on the modern vision Transformers, and show strong potential in representation learning by introducing special designs on some components, such as clustering on pixels [7], prediction of mean color [15], and tokenization via an additional dVAE network with a block-wise masking strategy [1]. In contrary to these complex designs, we present an extremely simple framework, SimMIM, which shows similar or even slightly better effectiveness.
items.zh: 掩码图像建模[13, 38, 23, 47, 7]与NLP中的MLM任务并行发展，但长期处于非主流位置。上下文编码器方法[38]是这一方向的先驱工作，它掩码原始图像的矩形区域，并预测缺失像素。CPC[23, 47]通过对比预测编码损失在每个批次中通过验证任务预测补丁。最近，iGPT[7]、ViT[15]和BEiT[1]在现代视觉Transformer上重新引入了这种学习方法，并通过在某些组件上引入特殊设计（例如像素聚类[7]、平均颜色预测[15]、以及通过额外dVAE网络和分块掩码策略进行分词[1]）展示了表征学习的强大潜力。与这些复杂设计相反，我们提出了一个极其简单的框架SimMIM，它表现出相似甚至略好的有效性。

items.en: are also related to our approach, particularly the auto-encoder approaches [24, 41, 49, 50, 30, 37]. Similar as in our approach, they adopt a reconstruction task to recover the original signals. However, they are based on a different philosophy of visible signal reconstruction, other than the creation or prediction of invisible signals as in our approach. They thus progress in a very different path, by studying how to effectively regularize the task learning by proper regularization or architecture bottlenecks.
items.zh: 也与我们的方法相关，特别是自编码器方法[24, 41, 49, 50, 30, 37]。与我们的方法类似，它们采用重建任务来恢复原始信号。然而，它们基于不同的可见信号重建理念，而不是像我们的方法那样创造或预测不可见信号。因此，它们沿着非常不同的路径发展，研究如何通过适当的正则化或架构瓶颈来有效规范任务学习。

items.en: Beyond representation learning, masked image modeling is a classical computer vision problem, named image inpainting. This problem has been extensively studied in computer vision for a long time [39, 55, 56], aiming for improving the inpainting quality and without connecting to self-supervised representation learning. While we advocate image inpainting as a strong self-supervised pre-text task, we also find stronger inpainting capability does not necessarily leads to stronger fine-tuning performance on down-stream tasks.
items.zh: 超越表征学习，掩码图像建模是一个经典的计算机视觉问题，称为图像修复。这个问题在计算机视觉中已被广泛研究了很长时间[39, 55, 56]，旨在提高修复质量，且未与自监督表征学习联系起来。虽然我们主张图像修复是一个强大的自监督预文本任务，但我们也发现更强的修复能力不一定导致下游任务上更强的微调性能。

items.en: The approach in this paper is also related to compressed sensing [14], which affirms most of the data we acquire including image signals can be thrown away with almost no perceptual loss. Such claim is also partly supported by recent works of sparse inference [20] that the recognition accuracy has very little drop after throwing a large portion of image features [25, 54, 43]. The observation in this paper goes further for the input signals, that with an extremely small portion of randomly selected input image patches as input, i.e., 10%, the inpainting task can still be learnt to produce good visual representations.
items.zh: 本文的方法也与压缩感知[14]相关，它确认我们获取的大部分数据（包括图像信号）可以丢弃而几乎没有感知损失。这一主张也部分得到最近稀疏推理工作[20]的支持，即丢弃大部分图像特征后识别准确率下降很小[25, 54, 43]。本文的观察对输入信号更进一步，即仅以极小的随机选择输入图像块作为输入（例如10%），修复任务仍然可以学习产生良好的视觉表征。

items.en: During the last two decades, there have been numerous pretext tasks to learn visual representation in a self-supervised way: gray-scale image colorization [60], jigsaw puzzle solving [36], split-brain auto-encoding [61], rotation prediction [18], learning to cluster [4]. Though very different from masked image modeling, some of them interestingly also follow a philosophy of predicting the invisible parts of signals, e.g., [60, 61] use one or two color channels as input to predict values of other channels. Another large portion of works lie in the contrastive learning approaches [16, 51, 21, 8, 3, 19, 53], which are the previous mainstream. We hope our work can encourage the study of masked language modeling as a pre-text task for self-supervised visual representation learning.
items.zh: 在过去的二十年中，有许多预文本任务以自监督方式学习视觉表征：灰度图像着色[60]、拼图求解[36]、分裂大脑自编码[61]、旋转预测[18]、学习聚类[4]。尽管与掩码图像建模非常不同，但有趣的是，其中一些也遵循预测信号不可见部分的理念，例如[60, 61]使用一个或两个颜色通道作为输入来预测其他通道的值。另一大部分工作属于对比学习方法[16, 51, 21, 8, 3, 19, 53]，这是之前的主流。我们希望我们的工作能够鼓励将掩码语言建模作为自监督视觉表征学习的预文本任务进行研究。

items.en: Our approach SimMIM learns representation through masked image modeling, which masks a portion of input image signals and predicts the original signals at masked area. The framework consists of 4 major components:
items.zh: 我们的方法SimMIM通过掩码图像建模学习表征，它掩码部分输入图像信号并预测掩码区域的原始信号。该框架包含4个主要组成部分：

items.en: Masking strategy. Given an input image, this component designs how to select the area to mask, and how to implement masking of selected area. The transformed image after masking will be used as the input.
items.zh: 掩码策略。给定输入图像，该组成部分设计如何选择要掩码的区域，以及如何实现所选区域的掩码。掩码后的变换图像将用作输入。

items.en: Encoder architecture. It extracts a latent feature representation for the masked image, which is then used to predict the original signals at the masked area. The learnt encoder is expected to be transferable to various vision tasks. In this paper, we mainly consider two typical vision Transformer architectures: a vanilla ViT [15] and Swin Transformer [34].
items.zh: 编码器架构。它提取掩码图像的潜在特征表示，然后用于预测掩码区域的原始信号。学习到的编码器预期可迁移到各种视觉任务。本文主要考虑两种典型的视觉Transformer架构：普通ViT [15]和Swin Transformer [34]。

items.en: Prediction head. The prediction head will be applied on the latent feature representation to produce one form of the original signals at the masked area.
items.zh: 预测头。预测头将应用于潜在特征表示，以生成掩码区域原始信号的一种形式。

items.en: Prediction target. This component defines the form of original signals to predict. It can be either the raw pixel values or a transformation of the raw pixels. This component also defines the loss type, with typical options including the cross-entropy classification loss and the ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} or ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} regression losses.
items.zh: 预测目标。该组件定义要预测的原始信号的形式。它可以是原始像素值或原始像素的变换。该组件还定义损失类型，典型选项包括交叉熵分类损失和ℓ1或ℓ2回归损失。

items.en: In the following subsections, we will present typical options of each component. These options are then systematically studied. By combining simple designs of each component, we have been able to achieve strong representation learning performance.
items.zh: 在以下小节中，我们将介绍每个组件的典型选项。然后对这些选项进行系统研究。通过结合每个组件的简单设计，我们能够实现强大的表示学习性能。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of masking area generated by different masking strategies using a same mask ratio of 0.6: square masking [38], block-wise masking [1] apply on 16-sized patches, and our simple random masking strategy on different patch sizes (e.g., 4, 8, 16 and 32).
items.capZh: 图2：使用相同掩码比例0.6的不同掩码策略生成的掩码区域示意图：方形掩码[38]、块状掩码[1]应用于16大小的补丁，以及我们在不同补丁大小（例如4、8、16和32）上的简单随机掩码策略。

items.en: For input transformation of masked area, we follow the NLP community [12, 32] and BEiT [1] to use a learnable mask token vector to replace each masked patch. The token vector dimension is set the same as that of the other visible patch representation after patch embedding. For masking area selection, we study the following masking strategies (illustrated in Figure 2):
items.zh: 对于掩码区域的输入变换，我们遵循NLP社区[12, 32]和BEiT [1]，使用可学习的掩码标记向量替换每个掩码补丁。标记向量维度设置为与补丁嵌入后其他可见补丁表示相同。对于掩码区域选择，我们研究以下掩码策略（如图2所示）：

items.en: We first present a patch-aligned random masking strategy. Image patches are the basic processing units of vision Transformers, and it is convenient to operate the masking on patch-level that a patch is either fully visible or fully masked. For Swin Transformer, we consider equivalent patch sizes of different resolution stages, 4×\times4∼similar-to\sim32×\times32, and adopt 32×\times32 by default which is the patch size of the last stage. For ViT, we adopt 32×\times32 as the default masked patch size.
items.zh: 我们首先提出一种补丁对齐的随机掩码策略。图像补丁是视觉Transformer的基本处理单元，在补丁级别上进行掩码操作很方便，即一个补丁要么完全可见，要么完全掩码。对于Swin Transformer，我们考虑不同分辨率阶段的等效补丁大小，4×4∼32×32，默认采用32×32，即最后阶段的补丁大小。对于ViT，我们默认采用32×32作为掩码补丁大小。

items.en: We also try other masking strategies in previous works: 1) [38] introduces a central region masking strategy. We relax it to be randomly movable on the image. 2) [1] introduces a complex block-wise masking strategy. We try this mask strategy on two masked patch sizes of 16×16161616\times 16 and 32×32323232\times 32.
items.zh: 我们还尝试了先前工作中的其他掩码策略：1) [38]引入了一种中心区域掩码策略。我们将其放宽为在图像上随机移动。2) [1]引入了一种复杂的块状掩码策略。我们在两种掩码补丁大小16×16和32×32上尝试了这种掩码策略。

items.en: The prediction head can be of arbitrary form and capacity, as long as its input conforms with the encoder output and its output accomplishes the prediction target. Some early works follow auto-encoders to employ a heavy prediction head (decoder) [38]. In this paper, we show that the prediction head can be made extremely lightweight, as light as a linear layer. We also try heavier heads such as a 2-layer MLP, an inverse Swin-T, and an inverse Swin-B.
items.zh: 预测头可以是任意形式和容量，只要其输入与编码器输出一致，且其输出完成预测目标。一些早期工作遵循自编码器使用重型预测头（解码器）[38]。在本文中，我们表明预测头可以做得非常轻量，轻至线性层。我们还尝试了更重的头，如2层MLP、逆Swin-T和逆Swin-B。

items.en: The pixel values are continuous in the color space. A straight-forward option is to predict raw pixels of the masked area by regression. In general, vision architectures usually produce feature maps of down-sampled resolution, e.g., 16×16\times in ViT and 32×32\times for most other architectures. To predict all pixel values at a full resolution of input images, we map each feature vector in feature map back to the original resolution, and let this vector take charge of the prediction of corresponding raw pixels.
items.zh: 像素值在颜色空间中是连续的。一个直接的选择是通过回归预测掩码区域的原始像素。通常，视觉架构通常产生下采样分辨率的特征图，例如ViT中的16×16，以及大多数其他架构中的32×32。为了以输入图像的全分辨率预测所有像素值，我们将特征图中的每个特征向量映射回原始分辨率，并让该向量负责预测相应的原始像素。

items.en: For example, on the 32×32\times down-sampled feature maps produced by a Swin Transformer encoder, we apply a 1×1111\times 1 convolution (linear) layer with output dimension of 3072=32×32×33072323233072=32\times 32\times 3 to stand for the RGB values of 32×32323232\times 32 pixels. We also consider lower resolution targets by downsampling the original images by {32×,16×,8×,4×,2×}\{32\times,16\times,8\times,4\times,2\times\}, respectively.
items.zh: 例如，在Swin Transformer编码器产生的32×32下采样特征图上，我们应用一个1×1卷积（线性）层，输出维度为3072=32×32×3，代表32×32像素的RGB值。我们还通过分别将原始图像下采样{32×,16×,8×,4×,2×}来考虑更低分辨率的目标。

items.en: An ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1}-loss is employed on the masked pixels:
items.zh: 在掩码像素上采用ℓ1损失：

items.en: where 𝐱,𝐲∈ℝ3​H​W×1𝐱𝐲superscriptℝ3𝐻𝑊1\mathbf{x},\mathbf{y}\in\mathbb{R}^{3HW\times 1} are the input RGB values and the predicted values, respectively; M𝑀M denotes the set of masked pixels; Ω​(⋅)Ω⋅\Omega(\cdot) is the number of elements. We also consider ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} and smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss in experiments which perform similarly well, and ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss is adopted by default.
items.zh: 其中x,y∈ℝ^{3HW×1}分别是输入RGB值和预测值；M表示掩码像素集合；Ω(·)是元素数量。我们在实验中也考虑了ℓ2和平滑ℓ1损失，它们表现相似，默认采用ℓ1损失。

items.en: Previous approaches mostly convert the masked signals to clusters or classes, and then perform a classification task for masked image prediction.
items.zh: 先前的方法大多将掩码信号转换为聚类或类别，然后对掩码图像预测执行分类任务。

items.en: Color clustering. In iGPT [7], the RGB values are grouped into 512 clusters by k𝑘k-means using a large amount of natural images. Each pixel is then assigned to the closest cluster center. This approach requires an additional clustering step to generate the 9-bit color palette. In our experiments, we use the 512 cluster centers learnt in iGPT.
items.zh: 颜色聚类。在iGPT [7]中，RGB值通过k-means使用大量自然图像分组为512个聚类。然后每个像素被分配到最近的聚类中心。这种方法需要额外的聚类步骤来生成9位调色板。在我们的实验中，我们使用iGPT中学习的512个聚类中心。

items.en: Vision tokenization. In BEiT [1], a discrete VAE (dVAE) network [40] is employed to transform image patches to dVAE tokens. The token identity is used as the classification target. In this approach, an additional dVAE network needs to be pre-trained.
items.zh: 视觉分词化。在BEiT [1]中，使用离散VAE（dVAE）网络[40]将图像补丁转换为dVAE标记。标记身份用作分类目标。在这种方法中，需要预训练一个额外的dVAE网络。

items.en: Channel-wise bin color discretization. The R, G, B channels are separately classified, with each channel discretized into equal bins, e.g., 8 and 256 bins used in the experiments.
items.zh: 通道级分箱颜色离散化。R、G、B通道分别分类，每个通道离散化为等间隔的箱子，例如实验中使用的8和256个箱子。

items.en: We follow [1] to mainly evaluate the quality of learnt representations by fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K image classification, which is a more usable scenario in practice. We will mainly account for this metric in our ablations. In the system-level comparison, we also follow previous works [21, 8, 3, 19, 7, 1] to report the performance on previous dominant metric of linear probing. Nevertheless, we will not account on this linear probing metric, as our main goal is to learn representations which can well complement the following down-stream tasks.
items.zh: 我们遵循[1]主要通过ImageNet-1K图像分类微调来评估学习表示的质量，这在实践中是更可用的场景。我们将在消融实验中主要考虑这个指标。在系统级比较中，我们也遵循先前工作[21, 8, 3, 19, 7, 1]报告先前主导指标线性探测的性能。然而，我们不会依赖这个线性探测指标，因为我们的主要目标是学习能够很好补充后续下游任务的表示。

items.en: We adopt Swin-B [34] as the default backbone in our ablation study, which facilitates us to evaluate the learnt representations also on downstream tasks such as object detection and semantic segmentation (see Appendix). To reduce experimental overhead, we use a default input image size of 1922superscript1922192^{2} and adapt the window size as 6 to accommodate the changed input image size. The ImageNet-1K image classification dataset is used for both pre-training and fine-tuning.
items.zh: 我们在消融研究中默认采用Swin-B [34]作为骨干网络，这便于我们也在下游任务（如目标检测和语义分割）上评估学习到的表示（见附录）。为了减少实验开销，我们使用默认输入图像大小192²，并将窗口大小调整为6以适应更改后的输入图像大小。ImageNet-1K图像分类数据集用于预训练和微调。

items.en: In self-supervised pre-training, we employ an AdamW optimizer [29] with a cosine learning rate scheduler, and train for 100 epochs. The training hyper-parameters are: the batch size as 2048, base learning rate as 8e-4, weight decay as 0.05, β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999, warm-up for 10 epochs. A light data augmentation strategy is used: random resize cropping with scale range of [0.67,1]0.671[0.67,1] and a aspect ratio range of [3/4,4/3]3443[3/4,4/3], followed by a random flipping and a color normalization steps.
items.zh: 在自监督预训练中，我们使用AdamW优化器[29]和余弦学习率调度器，训练100个epoch。训练超参数为：批量大小2048，基础学习率8e-4，权重衰减0.05，β1=0.9，β2=0.999，预热10个epoch。使用轻量数据增强策略：随机调整大小裁剪，尺度范围[0.67,1]，宽高比范围[3/4,4/3]，然后随机翻转和颜色归一化步骤。

items.en: The default options for the components of SimMIM are: a random masking strategy with a patch size of 32×\times32 and a mask ratio of 0.6; a linear prediction head with a target image size of 1922superscript1922192^{2}; an ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss for masked pixel prediction. Our ablation is conducted by varying one option and keeping other settings the same as that of the default.
items.zh: SimMIM各组件的默认选项为：随机掩码策略，补丁大小为32×32，掩码比例为0.6；线性预测头，目标图像大小为192²；掩码像素预测采用ℓ₁损失。我们的消融实验通过改变一个选项并保持其他设置与默认相同来进行。

items.en: In fine-tuning, we also employ an AdamW optimizer, 100-epoch training, and a cosine learning rate scheduler with 10-epoch warm-up. The fine-tunig hyper-parameters are: the batch size as 2048, a base learning rate of 5e-3, a weight decay of 0.05, β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999, a stochastic depth [26] ratio of 0.1, and a layer-wise learning rate decay of 0.9. We follow the same data augmentation used in [1], including RandAug [10], Mixup [59], Cutmix [57], label smoothing [45], and random erasing [62].
items.zh: 在微调中，我们还采用AdamW优化器、100轮训练以及带有10轮预热周期的余弦学习率调度器。微调超参数为：批量大小2048，基础学习率5e-3，权重衰减0.05，β₁=0.9，β₂=0.999，随机深度[26]比率为0.1，逐层学习率衰减为0.9。我们采用与[1]相同的数据增强方法，包括RandAug [10]、Mixup [59]、Cutmix [57]、标签平滑[45]和随机擦除[62]。

items.en: We first study how different masking strategies affect the effectiveness of representation learning. The fine-tuning accuracy of different approaches under multiple masking ratios are summarized in Table 1.
items.zh: 我们首先研究不同掩码策略如何影响表示学习的有效性。表1总结了不同方法在多种掩码比例下的微调准确率。

items.capEn: Figure 3: (a) AvgDist (averaged distance of masked pixels to the nearest visible pixels) w.r.t. different masking ratios using different masking strategies and different masked patch sizes; (b) fine-tuning performance (top-1 accuracy) w.r.t. AvgDist.
items.capZh: 图3：(a) 不同掩码策略和不同掩码补丁大小下，AvgDist（掩码像素到最近可见像素的平均距离）随掩码比例的变化；(b) 微调性能（top-1准确率）随AvgDist的变化。

items.en: We first notice that the best accuracy of our simple random masking strategy reaches 83.0%, which is +0.3% higher than the best of other more specially designed strategies such as the block-wise masking as in [1].
items.zh: 我们首先注意到，我们简单的随机掩码策略的最佳准确率达到83.0%，比[1]中块状掩码等其他专门设计的策略的最佳结果高出0.3%。

items.en: In addition, when a large masked patch size of 32 is adopted, this simple strategy performs stably well on a broad range of masking ratios (10%-70%). We hypothesize that the centering pixel of a large masked patch may be distant enough to visible pixels. Thus it enforces the network to learn relatively long-range connections, even when a low masking ratio is used (e.g., 10%) or all patches around are not masked. Another way to increase the prediction distance is to use larger masking ratio, which also shows to benefit the fine-tuning performance of relatively small patch sizes. By increasing the masking ratio from 0.4 to 0.8 at a patch size of 4, 8 and 16, the accuracy is smoothly improved by +0.2% (from 81.9% to 82.1%), +0.4% (from 82.0% to 82.4%), and +0.4% (from 82.4% to 82.8%), respectively. Nevertheless, the overall accuracy at these smaller patches is not as high as that at a larger patch size of 32. Further increasing the patch size to 64 is observed with degraded accuracy, probably due to the too large prediction distance.
items.zh: 此外，当采用较大的掩码补丁大小32时，该简单策略在广泛的掩码比例（10%-70%）下表现稳定。我们假设，大掩码补丁的中心像素可能距离可见像素足够远，从而迫使网络学习相对长程的连接，即使在使用低掩码比例（例如10%）或周围所有补丁都未被掩码时也是如此。另一种增加预测距离的方法是使用更大的掩码比例，这也显示出对相对较小补丁大小的微调性能有益。通过将掩码比例从0.4增加到0.8，在补丁大小为4、8和16时，准确率分别平滑提高了+0.2%（从81.9%到82.1%）、+0.4%（从82.0%到82.4%）和+0.4%（从82.4%到82.8%）。然而，这些较小补丁的整体准确率并不如补丁大小为32时高。进一步将补丁大小增加到64时，观察到准确率下降，可能是由于预测距离过大。

items.en: The above observations and analyses can also be well reflected by a newly proposed AvgDist metric, which measures the averaged Euclidean distance of masked pixels to the nearest visible ones. The AvgDist of different masking strategies w.r.t. varying masking ratios are shown in Figure 3(a). From this figure, we observe that the AvgDist of all masking strategies is smoothly increased with growing masking ratios. For random masking strategy, when the masked patch size is low, e.g., 4 or 8, the AvgDist is relatively low and grows slowly with increasing masking ratios. On the other hand, when the patch size is large, e.g., 64, very small masking ratio (e.g. 10%) still makes relatively large AvgDist. The square and block-wise methods produce similarly high AvgDist values as of patch size 64.
items.zh: 上述观察和分析也可以很好地由新提出的AvgDist指标反映，该指标衡量掩码像素到最近可见像素的平均欧氏距离。不同掩码策略的AvgDist随掩码比例的变化如图3(a)所示。从该图我们观察到，所有掩码策略的AvgDist都随着掩码比例的增加而平滑增加。对于随机掩码策略，当掩码补丁大小较小时（例如4或8），AvgDist相对较低，并且随着掩码比例的增加而缓慢增长。另一方面，当补丁大小较大时（例如64），即使很小的掩码比例（例如10%）也会产生相对较大的AvgDist。方形和块状方法产生的AvgDist值与补丁大小64时相似且较高。

items.en: In our experiments, we adopt a masking ratio of 0.6 on patch size of 32 by default, due to its stable performance. Also note that the masking strategies and ratios in the language domain are very different from what explored in our work, which usually adopts a small masking ratio of 15%. We hypothesize that different degrees of information redundancy by two modalities may lead to the different behaviors.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，我们默认采用补丁大小为32、掩码比例为0.6，因其性能稳定。另请注意，语言领域的掩码策略和比例与我们工作中探索的非常不同，语言领域通常采用15%的小掩码比例。我们假设两种模态的信息冗余程度不同可能导致不同的行为。

items.en: Also note that in previous contrastive learning approaches [21, 8, 19], it is a common practice to use a multi-layer MLP head in the pre-text tasks, instead of a linear layer, which makes the latent feature produced by the encoder moderately distant to the pre-text target, and shows beneficial for the linear probing evaluation metric. In our work, we show that a single linear layer head in our approach, under a fine-tuning metric, has shown competitive or even the optimal transferring performance. It indicates that if our aim is to learn good features for fine-tuning, the important exploration on head designing in contrastive learning approaches may not be necessary for that of masked image modeling.
items.zh: 另请注意，在之前的对比学习方法[21, 8, 19]中，常见做法是在前置任务中使用多层MLP头，而不是线性层，这使得编码器产生的潜在特征与前置任务目标保持适度距离，并有利于线性探测评估指标。在我们的工作中，我们表明，在微调指标下，我们方法中的单个线性层头已显示出具有竞争力甚至最优的迁移性能。这表明，如果我们的目标是学习用于微调的良好特征，那么对比学习方法中关于头设计的重要探索对于掩码图像建模可能并非必要。

items.en: Note that we adopt a default target resolution of 1922superscript1922192^{2} in our experiments, due to the equally best transferring accuracy and the negligible computation overhead.
items.zh: 注意，我们在实验中默认采用目标分辨率192²，因为其迁移准确率同样最佳且计算开销可忽略。

items.en: The three losses of ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1}, smooth-ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1}, and ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} perform similarly well;
items.zh: ℓ₁、平滑ℓ₁和ℓ₂三种损失表现相似；

items.en: Carefully defined classes by color clustering [7] or tokenization [1] perform slightly worse than ours;
items.zh: 通过颜色聚类[7]或标记化[1]精心定义的类比我们的稍差；

items.en: A simple color discretization approach by channel-wise equal-sized bins (proposed as an alternative option) performs competitive to ℓ1subscriptℓ1\ell_{1} loss, but it requires a careful tuning of the bin number (e.g., 8-bin).
items.zh: 一种简单的颜色离散化方法（按通道等距分箱，作为替代选项提出）与ℓ₁损失表现相当，但需要仔细调整分箱数量（例如8箱）。

items.en: It reveals that it is not necessary to align the target of masked image modeling to be the same classification based as masked language modeling. It is good to align the approach to the own nature of visual signals.
items.zh: 这表明，掩码图像建模的目标不必与掩码语言建模一样基于分类。将方法与视觉信号的自身性质对齐是好的。

items.en: While both auto-encoders and masked image modeling approaches learn a network by recovering the original signals, they are built on different philosophies of visible signal reconstruction and prediction of invisible signals. In our framework, we can instantiate a reconstruction task by also regress the raw pixel values of visible patches in the input.
items.zh: 虽然自编码器和掩码图像建模方法都通过恢复原始信号来学习网络，但它们建立在不同的理念上：可见信号重建与不可见信号预测。在我们的框架中，我们也可以通过回归输入中可见补丁的原始像素值来实例化重建任务。

full.sec: 4.2 Comparison to Previous Approaches on ViT-B

items.en: As previous works [5, 1] performed experiments on the ViT architectures, for fair comparison, we also conduct experiments using the ViT-B architecture.
items.zh: 由于先前的工作[5, 1]在ViT架构上进行了实验，为了公平比较，我们也使用ViT-B架构进行实验。

items.en: In pre-training, 800 epochs with a cosine learning rate scheduler and a 20-epoch linear warm-up procedure are employed. All other hyper-parameters strictly follow the same settings as in the ablation study, except that we use a 2242superscript2242224^{2} input resolution to be the same as in previous approaches. In fine-tuning, we adopt a layer-wise learning rate decay of 0.65 following [1], and keep all other settings strictly the same as in our ablation study. In linear probing, we follow [1] to choose an inter-mediate layer of ViT-B which produces the best linear probing accuracy. 100-epoch training with a 5-epoch linear warm-up step is employed.
items.zh: 在预训练中，采用800轮训练，使用余弦学习率调度器和20轮线性预热过程。所有其他超参数严格遵循消融研究中的相同设置，只是我们使用224²的输入分辨率以与先前方法保持一致。在微调中，我们采用0.65的逐层学习率衰减，遵循[1]，并保持所有其他设置与消融研究严格相同。在线性探测中，我们遵循[1]选择ViT-B的中间层，该层产生最佳的线性探测准确率。采用100轮训练，带有5轮线性预热步骤。

items.en: Though our main focus is to learn representations that are better for fine-tuning, we also report the linear probing accuracy of different approaches for reference.
items.zh: 虽然我们的主要重点是学习更适合微调的表示，但我们也报告了不同方法的线性探测准确率以供参考。

items.en: We adopt Swin Transformer of different model sizes for experiments, including Swin-B, Swin-L, SwinV2-H, and SwinV2-G [33]. To reduce experimental overheads, we adopt a smaller image size of 1922superscript1922192^{2} in pre-training, and a step learning rate scheduler that the experiments of different training lengths can reuse model training of the first step. The base learning rate of the first learning rate step is set 4e-4 and lasts for 7/8 of the total training epochs. The learning rate is divided by 10 for the remaining epochs. For model sizes of H and G, we use the variants introduced in [33], which have stronger stability than the original version. All models use the ImageNet-1K dataset for training, except that SwinV2-G uses a larger and privately collected ImageNet-22K-ext dataset, as detailed in [33].
items.zh: 我们采用不同模型大小的Swin Transformer进行实验，包括Swin-B、Swin-L、SwinV2-H和SwinV2-G [33]。为减少实验开销，我们在预训练中采用较小的图像尺寸192²，并使用步进学习率调度器，使得不同训练长度的实验可以重用第一步的模型训练。第一个学习率步骤的基础学习率设为4e-4，持续总训练轮数的7/8。剩余轮数的学习率除以10。对于H和G模型大小，我们使用[33]中引入的变体，其稳定性优于原始版本。所有模型使用ImageNet-1K数据集进行训练，但SwinV2-G使用更大的私有ImageNet-22K-ext数据集，详见[33]。

items.en: When using ImageNet-1K for pre-training, all models are trained by 800 epochs, with most other hyper-parameters following that in ablations. In fine-tuning, a larger image size of 2242superscript2242224^{2} is employed. For SwinV2-H, we also consider a larger resolution of 5122superscript5122512^{2}. The training length of fine-tuning is set 100-epoch, except for SwinV2-H where 50-epoch is used. The layer-wise learning rate decay is set as 0.8, 0.75, and 0.7 for Swin-B, Swin-L, and SwinV2-H, respectively. Other fine-tuning hyper-parameters follow that in ablation.
items.zh: 当使用ImageNet-1K进行预训练时，所有模型训练800轮，大多数其他超参数遵循消融实验中的设置。在微调中，采用更大的图像尺寸224²。对于SwinV2-H，我们还考虑了更大的分辨率512²。微调的训练轮数设为100轮，但SwinV2-H使用50轮。逐层学习率衰减设为：Swin-B为0.8，Swin-L为0.75，SwinV2-H为0.7。其他微调超参数遵循消融实验中的设置。

items.en: While all previous billion-level vision models rely on Google’s JFT-3B dataset for model training [58, 44, 11], the proposed SimMIM approach is used to aid the training of a 3B SwinV2-G model [33] by using ∼similar-to\sim40×\times smaller data than that of JFT-3B. It achieves strong performance on four representative vision benchmarks: 84.0% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-V2 classification [42], 63.1/54.4 box/mask mAP on COCO object detection [6, 31], 59.9 mIoU on ADE20K semantic segmentation [63, 52], and 86.8% top-1 acc on Kinetics-400 action recognition [28, 35]. More details are described in [33].
items.zh: 尽管之前所有十亿级视觉模型都依赖谷歌的JFT-3B数据集进行模型训练[58, 44, 11]，但所提出的SimMIM方法通过使用比JFT-3B小约40倍的数据，辅助训练了一个3B的SwinV2-G模型[33]。它在四个代表性视觉基准上取得了强劲性能：ImageNet-V2分类任务上84.0%的top-1准确率[42]，COCO目标检测任务上63.1/54.4的框/掩膜mAP[6, 31]，ADE20K语义分割任务上59.9的mIoU[63, 52]，以及Kinetics-400动作识别任务上86.8%的top-1准确率[28, 35]。更多细节见[33]。

items.capZh: 图4：使用三种不同掩膜类型恢复的图像（从左到右）：随机掩膜、掩膜主要物体的大部分、掩膜整个主要物体。

For each batch, images from left to right are raw image, masked image, prediction of masked patches only, and reconstruction of all patches, respectively.

items.en: In this section, we attempt to understand the proposed approach as well as some critical designs through visualizations. All example images are from the ImageNet-1K validation set.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们试图通过可视化来理解所提出的方法以及一些关键设计。所有示例图像均来自ImageNet-1K验证集。

items.en: These observations indicate that the approach has learnt strong reasoning ability of objects, and the ability is not due to memorization of image identities or the simple copying of nearby pixels.
items.zh: 这些观察表明，该方法已学习到强大的物体推理能力，且该能力并非源于对图像身份的記憶或对邻近像素的简单复制。

items.en: We have shown the comparison of the representations learnt by a masked prediction task (our approach), and a joint masked prediction and visible signal reconstruction task in Table 4, which reveals that the pure masked prediction task performs significantly better. Figure 5 compares the recovery effects by two approaches. It shows that the latter approach makes better looking, however, probably the model capacity is wasted at the recovery of the unmasked area which may not be that useful for fine-tuning.
items.zh: 我们已在表4中展示了掩膜预测任务（我们的方法）与联合掩膜预测和可见信号重建任务所学表示的比较，结果表明纯掩膜预测任务表现显著更好。图5比较了两种方法的恢复效果。它显示后一种方法生成的图像外观更好，然而，模型容量可能被浪费在掩膜区域的恢复上，而这对于微调可能并不那么有用。

items.capEn: Figure 6: An example of recovered image using masked patch sizes of 4, 8, 16, 32 and 64, and a fixed masked ratio of 0.6.
items.capZh: 图6：使用掩膜块大小分别为4、8、16、32和64，且固定掩膜比例为0.6时恢复的图像示例。

items.en: This paper presents a simple yet effective self-supervised learning framework, SimMIM, to leverage masked image modeling for representation learning. This framework is made as simple as possible: 1) a random masking strategy with a moderately large masked patch size; 2) predicting raw pixels of RGB values by direct regression task; 3) the prediction head can be as light as a linear layer. We hope our strong results as well as the simple framework can facilitate future study of this line, and encourage in-depth interaction between AI fields.
items.zh: 本文提出了一个简单而有效的自监督学习框架SimMIM，利用掩膜图像建模进行表示学习。该框架尽可能简单：1）采用随机掩膜策略，掩膜块大小适中偏大；2）通过直接回归任务预测RGB值的原始像素；3）预测头可以轻量到仅为一个线性层。我们希望我们强劲的结果以及简单的框架能够促进该方向的未来研究，并鼓励人工智能领域之间的深度互动。

full.sec: Appendix B The Effect of Learning Rate Schedulers
full.secZh: 附录B 学习率调度器的影响

items.en: In our ablation study, we follow common practice [15, 1] to use a cosine learning rate scheduler. In our scaling up experiments, we adopt a step learning rate scheduler to reduce experimental overheads of potentially studying the effects of different training lengths.
items.zh: 在我们的消融研究中，我们遵循常见做法[15, 1]使用余弦学习率调度器。在扩展实验中，我们采用阶梯学习率调度器，以减少潜在研究不同训练长度效果的开销。

items.en: In this section, we investigate the effects of different schedulers on fine-tuning accuracy. Both schedulers adopt 10-epoch linear warm-up. For the step learning rate scheduler, the base learning rate is set as 8e-4, and is decayed by a factor of 10 at 90% and 95% of the total training length. For this comparison, we follow the default settings used in ablation, except that the scheduler is changed. As shown in Table 9, the step scheduler performs marginally better than the cosine scheduler, by +0.1% using a 100-epoch pre-training, and by +0.3% using a longer 300-epoch training procedure.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们研究不同调度器对微调准确率的影响。两种调度器均采用10个epoch的线性预热。对于阶梯学习率调度器，基础学习率设为8e-4，并在总训练长度的90%和95%处衰减10倍。为了进行比较，我们遵循消融中使用的默认设置，仅更改调度器。如表9所示，阶梯调度器的表现略优于余弦调度器，在100个epoch的预训练中提高了+0.1%，在更长的300个epoch训练过程中提高了+0.3%。

full.sec: Appendix C Results on Downstream Tasks
full.secZh: 附录C 下游任务结果

items.en: In this section, we add more results on several down-stream tasks, including iNaturalist (iNat) 2018 classification, COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们增加了几个下游任务的更多结果，包括iNaturalist (iNat) 2018分类、COCO目标检测和ADE20K语义分割。

items.en: iNaturalist [48] 2018 is a long-tail image classification dataset with more than 8,000 categories. It includes 437,513 training images and 24,426 validation images. We fine-tune the pre-trained models using an AdamW optimizer by 100 epochs. The fine-tuning hyper-parameters are: a batch size of 2048, a base learning rate of 1.6e-2, a weight decay of 0.05, β1=0.9subscript𝛽10.9\beta_{1}=0.9, β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999, a stochastic depth [26] ratio of 0.1, and a layer-wise learning rate decay of 0.9. We follow the same data augmentation strategies used in [1], including RandAug [10], Mixup [59], Cutmix [57], label smoothing [45], and random erasing [62].
items.zh: iNaturalist [48] 2018是一个长尾图像分类数据集，包含超过8000个类别。它包括437,513张训练图像和24,426张验证图像。我们使用AdamW优化器对预训练模型进行100个epoch的微调。微调超参数为：批量大小2048，基础学习率1.6e-2，权重衰减0.05，β1=0.9，β2=0.999，随机深度[26]比率0.1，逐层学习率衰减0.9。我们遵循[1]中使用的相同数据增强策略，包括RandAug [10]、Mixup [59]、Cutmix [57]、标签平滑[45]和随机擦除[62]。

items.en: A Mask-RCNN[22] framework is adopted and all models are trained with a 3×\times schedule (36 epochs). We utilize an AdamW[29] optimizer with a learning rate of 6e-5, a weight decay of 0.05, and a batch size of 32. Following [17], we employ a large jittering augmentation (1024 ×\times 1024 resolution, scale range [0.1, 2.0]). The window size for Swin-B is set to 7 and that for Swin-L and SwinV2-H models is 14.
items.zh: 采用Mask-RCNN[22]框架，所有模型均以3×计划（36个epoch）进行训练。我们使用AdamW[29]优化器，学习率6e-5，权重衰减0.05，批量大小32。遵循[17]，我们采用大幅抖动增强（1024×1024分辨率，尺度范围[0.1, 2.0]）。Swin-B的窗口大小设为7，Swin-L和SwinV2-H模型的窗口大小为14。

items.en: Following [34], An UPerNet framework[52] is used following [34]. We use an AdamW[29] optimizer using the following hyper-parameters: a weight decay of 0.05, a batch size of 32, a layer-wise decay rate of 0.9, and a learning rate searching from 1e-4 and 3e-4. All models are trained for 80K iterations with an input resolution of 512×\times512 and a window size of 20. In inference, a multi-scale test using resolutions that are [0.75, 0.875, 1.0, 1.125, 1.25]×\times of 512×\times2048 is employed.
items.zh: 遵循[34]，使用UPerNet框架[52]。我们使用AdamW[29]优化器，超参数如下：权重衰减0.05，批量大小32，逐层衰减率0.9，学习率在1e-4和3e-4之间搜索。所有模型训练80K次迭代，输入分辨率512×512，窗口大小20。推理时，采用多尺度测试，分辨率为512×2048的[0.75, 0.875, 1.0, 1.125, 1.25]倍。

items.en: For ADE20K experiments, we initialized the segmentation models using model weights after supervised fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K, because its performance is superior to using the self-supervised pre-trained weights directly.
items.zh: 对于ADE20K实验，我们使用在ImageNet-1K上监督微调后的模型权重初始化分割模型，因为其性能优于直接使用自监督预训练权重。

items.capEn: Figure 7: AvgDist (averaged distance of masked pixels to the nearest visible pixels) w.r.t. performance on ImageNet, iNat-2018, COCO and ADE20K.
items.capZh: 图7：AvgDist（掩膜像素到最近可见像素的平均距离）与ImageNet、iNat-2018、COCO和ADE20K上性能的关系。

items.en: We also use these additional down-stream tasks to verify different masking strategies, as shown in Figure 7. It turns out that the observations in Figure 3 of the main paper also hold: 1) the AvgDist measure is a good indicator for the learning effectiveness of masked image modeling; 2) an AvgDist of 151515 is empirically good for masked image modeling.
items.zh: 我们还使用这些额外的下游任务来验证不同的掩膜策略，如图7所示。结果表明，论文图3中的观察结果同样成立：1）AvgDist度量是掩膜图像建模学习效果的良好指标；2）AvgDist为15对于掩膜图像建模经验上较好。

items.en: With the remarkable performance of SimMIM on Vision Transformers, we want to verify its effectiveness on versatile architectures. Here we adopt ResNet-50×\times4 as the base architecture. The overall training setup remains the same as that of Swin-Base. We use masked tokens to replace the original features after the stem of a 3×3333\times 3 convolution of s​t​r​i​d​e=2𝑠𝑡𝑟𝑖𝑑𝑒2stride=2 followed by a 2×\times2 max-pooling operator.
items.zh: 鉴于SimMIM在视觉Transformer上的卓越性能，我们希望验证其在多种架构上的有效性。这里我们采用ResNet-50×4作为基础架构。整体训练设置与Swin-Base相同。我们使用掩膜标记替换经过步长为2的3×3卷积和2×2最大池化操作后的主干特征。

items.en: On ResNet-50×\times4, SimMIM achieves 81.6% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K validation set using 300-epoch pre-training and 100-epoch fine-tuning, outperforming the supervised counterpart by +0.9% (vs. 80.7%). This indicates the generality of SimMIM.
items.zh: 在 ResNet-50×\times4 上，SimMIM 使用 300 轮预训练和 100 轮微调，在 ImageNet-1K 验证集上达到 81.6% 的 top-1 准确率，比监督对应方法高出 +0.9%（对比 80.7%）。这表明了 SimMIM 的通用性。
